appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/contracts.md` to record that `npm run test:ats-contract` now validates both ATS example fixtures and live `app.js` request-builder payloads against the v1 request schema.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit dirty-baseline mission path so workers can commit isolated changes without recording cleanup/clean-git-status deviations when AGENTS.md intentionally preserves unrelated edits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All three fix reviews in this rerun (`repo-validation-install-and-regression-hardening`, `ats-request-contract-and-transport-alignment`, `discovery-worker-credential-preflight-hardening`) reported justified procedure deviations because mission AGENTS.md preserves an intentionally dirty baseline while the base worker procedure still expects cleanup or clean git status.
